title: CBDT Introduces New DIN Rules for Income Tax Notices (Circular No. 4/2026)
content:
# CBDT Introduces New DIN Rules for Income Tax Notices (Circular No. 4/2026)

Ek important update hai! Government ne income tax notices aur other communications ke liye naye Document Identification Number (DIN) rules announce kiye hain. Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne Circular No. 4/2026 dated April 02, 2026, issue kiya hai, jisse tax administration mein aur transparency aayegi.

**Key Highlights of the New DIN Rules:**

*   **Mandatory DIN:** Ab se, Income Tax Authorities द्वारा issued har notice, order, letter, summons, ya koi bhi official communication par ek valid computer-generated DIN hona compulsory hoga.
*   **Replaced Old Circular:** Yeh naye rules Circular No. 19/2019 ko supersede karte hain.
*   **Exceptions Allowed:** Kuch specific situations hain jahan DIN generate nahi ho paayega, jaise technical issues, system access na hona, ya urgent field communications.
*   **Post-Facto Approval:** Agar koi communication bina DIN ke issue hoti hai, toh usme reason mention karna hoga aur competent authority se 15 din ke andar post-facto approval lena mandatory hoga. Aisi communications ko baad mein system par DIN ke saath upload bhi karna hoga.
*   **Objective:** In rules ka main aim tax administration mein transparency, accountability, aur traceability badhana hai, taki unauthorized ya fake notices issue na ho.

Taxpayers ko advise kiya jaata hai ki woh kisi bhi communication par DIN verify karein.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/)

*Published on: 2 April 2026*
